chapter_title.en: Chapter 122 – The crowding at the Black Stone

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/20)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/20)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اسْتَلِمُوا الرُّكْنَ فَإِنَّهُ يَمِينُ اللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ يُصَافِحُ بِهَا خَلْقَهُ مُصَافَحَةَ الْعَبْدِ أَوِ الرَّجُلِ يَشْهَدُ لِمَنِ اسْتَلَمَهُ بِالْمُوَافَاةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Ahmad Bin Musa, from Ali Bin Ja’far, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Touch the corner (of the Black Stone), for it is the Right Hand of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> among His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures. He<sup>azwj</sup> Shakes hands with His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures by it, like the shaking of the hands of the servants, or the man testifies, the one who touches it, with the loyalty’.
en.sarwar: 9. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Ahmad ibn Musa from Ali ibn Ja’far from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said this. ‘You should touch the corner (of the Black Stone); it is the right hand of Allah among His creatures with which He shakes hands with His creatures, like shaking hands by a slave - or a man (uncertainty is by the narrator) - and those who touch it bear witness to their standing up to their covenant.’”
